The '''''Badi Dea''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
It foiled the ''[[Sarsuma]]'', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]], in its attempt to steal [[Grain/Legends|grain]] during the food shortage following the evacuation from [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. Subsequently, the Star Destroyer also took part in investigating an [[Operation Grain Snatch|attack]] on one of [[Overlord (Imperial)|Overlord]] [[Ghorin]]'s convoy, which was supposed to resupply the Empire with fresh grain, but was instead carrying tainted grain.

Later, when the [[Leafar]] began to challenge Imperial rule, a convoy belonging to the Leafar was ambushed at their [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] lane by the ''Badi Dea'' in hopes of pacifying them through fear. However, the ambush ultimately failed, as the ships were saved from destruction thanks to intervention by Rebel [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]]. [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] piloted one of these ships.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
